title: Luxuriantly Creamy Turkish Boudin Noir Stew
description: A rich and comforting Turkish stew featuring boudin noir, with a creamy and grassy flavor profile, made with whole30-friendly ingredients and cooked in a slate-tile vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the slate-tile vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the boudin noir and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the turkish spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the fresh spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the coconut cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
